name: Idle Towers
short_description: An idle survival game with tower defense mechanics. Build your own perfect defese and face infinite waves of enemies!
detailed_description:
Idle Towers is a survival idle game with tower defense mechanics. Face infinite waves of enemies, upgrade your towers and try to survive as long as you can! Use various prestige and super upgrades to get even more power. Hardcore challenges, customization, rewards, achivements and many more features are waiting for you!

GAMEPLAY

Upgrade your towers to withstand the increasing onslaught of enemies. An addictive idle gameplay with tower defense mechanins and clicker game math!

HARDCORE

It's a real survival. If you are defeated, you will lose all temporary upgrades and level progress. Invest into permanent upgrades to move forward.

UPGRADES

Buy over a hundred improvements the create the most powerful and impregnable defense. Each upgrade matters!

PRESTIGE AND SUPER UPGRADES

Reset your current progress but receive the most valuable upgrades for your towers.

PASSIVE INCOME

The game has become too difficult? Go into deep defense and develop passive income. It's up to you how to generate money!

DIFFICULTY TIERS

Complete base levels and find out that it's just the beginning. Only the most persistent players will be able to pass all the challenges!

CUSTOMIZATION

Unlock various color schemes for the interface and other game elements. Customize your towers as you want!

ACHIEVEMENTS AND RANKING

Try to collect all Steam achievements and also conquer the global ranking system where you compete with players from all over the world.
